ns0:entry.ns0:title: Biohub/esm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Biohub/esm
Language: jupyter-notebook

ns0:entry.ns0:title: GokuMohandas/Made-With-ML
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GokuMohandas/Made-With-ML
Language: jupyter-notebook
Learn how to develop, deploy and iterate on production-grade ML applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Itsabhishek7py/GoogleCloudSkillsboost
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Itsabhishek7py/GoogleCloudSkillsboost
Language: jupyter-notebook
Collection of tutorials of gcsb labs Check out the channel fro complete guide

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Lordog/dive-into-llms
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Lordog/dive-into-llms
Language: jupyter-notebook
《动手学大模型Dive into LLMs》系列编程实践教程

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QwenLM/Qwen3-Omni
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QwenLM/Qwen3-Omni
Language: jupyter-notebook
Qwen3-omni is a natively end-to-end, omni-modal LLM developed by the Qwen team at Alibaba Cloud, capable of understanding text, audio, images, and video, as well as generating speech in real time.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: R6410418/Jackrong-llm-finetuning-guide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/R6410418/Jackrong-llm-finetuning-guide
Language: jupyter-notebook

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anthropics/claude-cookbooks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-cookbooks
Language: jupyter-notebook
A collection of notebooks/recipes showcasing some fun and effective ways of using Claude.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anthropics/courses
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/courses
Language: jupyter-notebook
Anthropic's educational courses

ns0:entry.ns0:title: charliedream1/ai_quant_trade
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/charliedream1/ai_quant_trade
Language: jupyter-notebook
股票AI操盘手：从学习、模拟到实盘，一站式平台。包含股票知识、策略实例、大模型、因子挖掘、传统策略、机器学习、深度学习、强化学习、图网络、高频交易、C++部署和聚宽实例代码等，可以方便学习、模拟及实盘交易

ns0:entry.ns0:title: datawhalechina/llm-algo-leetcode
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/datawhalechina/llm-algo-leetcode
Language: jupyter-notebook
LLM algorithm practice lab with theory, solutions, and test cases.《大模型算法实战教程》面向大模型入门到进阶的算法实战教程，覆盖原理讲解、答案解析、测试用例与 CUDA/Triton 实战。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: datawhalechina/llm-cookbook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/datawhalechina/llm-cookbook
Language: jupyter-notebook
面向开发者的 LLM 入门教程，吴恩达大模型系列课程中文版

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebookresearch/audiocraft
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebookresearch/audiocraft
Language: jupyter-notebook
Audiocraft is a library for audio processing and generation with deep learning. It features the state-of-the-art EnCodec audio compressor / tokenizer, along with MusicGen, a simple and controllable music generation LM with textual and melodic conditioning.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebookresearch/dinov3
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebookresearch/dinov3
Language: jupyter-notebook
Reference PyTorch implementation and models for DINOv3

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebookresearch/segment-anything
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebookresearch/segment-anything
Language: jupyter-notebook
The repository provides code for running inference with the SegmentAnything Model (SAM), links for downloading the trained model checkpoints, and example notebooks that show how to use the model.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google-deepmind/deepmind-research
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google-deepmind/deepmind-research
Language: jupyter-notebook
This repository contains implementations and illustrative code to accompany DeepMind publications

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google-gemini/cookbook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google-gemini/cookbook
Language: jupyter-notebook
Examples and guides for using the Gemini API

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jakevdp/PythonDataScienceHandbook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jakevdp/PythonDataScienceHandbook
Language: jupyter-notebook
Python Data Science Handbook: full text in Jupyter Notebooks

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lyogavin/airllm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lyogavin/airllm
Language: jupyter-notebook
AirLLM 70B inference with single 4GB GPU

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openai/CLIP
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openai/CLIP
Language: jupyter-notebook
CLIP (Contrastive Language-Image Pretraining), Predict the most relevant text snippet given an image

ns0:entry.ns0:title: oracle-devrel/oracle-ai-developer-hub
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/oracle-devrel/oracle-ai-developer-hub
Language: jupyter-notebook
Technical resources for AI developers to build applications, agents, and systems using Oracle AI Database and OCI services

ns0:entry.ns0:title: roboflow/notebooks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/roboflow/notebooks
Language: jupyter-notebook
A collection of tutorials on state-of-the-art computer vision models and techniques. Explore everything from foundational architectures like ResNet to cutting-edge models like RF-DETR, YOLO11, SAM 3, and Qwen3-VL.
